overall.description: A cinematic sequence from a video game (Hogwarts Legacy) begins with a static view of a dimly lit gothic classroom filled with students in dark robes, then transitions to third-person gameplay following a character running through ornate castle corridors and descending a spiral staircase.

segments.scene_description: A dimly lit gothic classroom or dining hall with students in dark robes seated at long wooden tables. The room features high arched windows, stone walls, and an iron chandelier. The camera remains stationary as a student walks past in the foreground.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic castle corridor and spiral staircase

character begins descending the spiral staircase
entering a brighter corridor with large windows showing greenery outside

agents.ego_description: running through castle corridors and descending a spiral staircase as a student in dark robes with green house scarf

tall stone statue of a robed figure in a niche
wooden spiral staircase with carved banisters descending downward
large leaded windows with stone tracery showing green trees outside
dark wooden wall paneling with gothic decorative elements

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to third-person perspective following a character exiting the classroom through a large wooden doorway. The character runs past a stone statue and descends a spiral staircase with wooden banisters, then enters a brighter corridor with ornate gothic windows overlooking greenery outside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the stillness of a dimly lit gothic hall into a dynamic pursuit through the castle's ornate architecture. It begins with a stationary view of students in dark robes seated at long wooden tables beneath an iron chandelier and high arched windows. As a student walks past in the foreground, the perspective shifts to follow a character exiting the room through a large wooden doorway. The camera then tracks the character as they run past a stone statue and descend a spiral staircase with wooden banisters, before finally emerging into a brighter corridor where ornate gothic windows reveal lush greenery outside.
